name: accounting firms managing petty cash for 5–15 clients/month tool
description: For accounting firms managing 5–15 clients/month, manual reconciliation causes late financial reporting. We automate petty cash reconciliation instead of manual tracking and reconciliation spreadsheets.
target_audience: accounting firms managing petty cash for 5–15 clients/month
problem_solved: manual reconciliation of petty cash transactions

locked_fields.primary_problem: manual reconciliation of petty cash transactions
